title: Matty Smith (footballer, born 1997)
extract: Matthew Smith (born 13 March 1997) is a Scottish Former footballer who played as a forward. He started his career with Dundee United and made his first team debut in May 2016, and subsequently had loan periods with Montrose and Cove Rangers before moving to Ireland with Waterford, St Patrick's Athletic, Derry City and Shelbourne.
